a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890.description: See sound create mesmerizing art! Xonogram uses your mic & Cymatics (Chladni patterns) inspiration to generate real-time, symmetrical visuals in your browser. Perfect for meditation, focus, music visualization, or a unique audio-visual experience.

a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890.title: Pixel Blaster
a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890.description:
3D pixel-style shoot 'em up game called "Pixel Blaster" that you can play right in your browser! It features low-poly 3D graphics with a pixelated aesthetic.
Game Features:

3D environment with a retro low-poly look
Player spaceship with movement in all directions
Three different types of enemy ships
Particle effects for explosions and hits
Score tracking and health system
Start screen and game over screen

Controls:

WASD or Arrow Keys to move your ship
Mouse to aim
Click to shoot
Spacebar to jump (avoid enemies)

Click the "Start Game" button to begin playing. The goal is to survive as long as possible while shooting down enemy ships to earn points. Each enemy type has different health, speed, and point values.
a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890.creator: StephaneLV

c54c0f8e-96eb-4e7b-988a-d67d68bb5ec1.title: Habitude App
c54c0f8e-96eb-4e7b-988a-d67d68bb5ec1.description:
Build better habits, together. 

A gamified habit tracker where small teams level up through daily check-ins, shared streaks, and weekly wrap-ups. Earn points, unlock wild-card challenges, and stay accountable with your league.

Core Features:
– Pick 1–3 habits per week
– Daily check-ins = points
– Team streak bonuses
– Fun wrap-up rituals + trophies
– Healthy habits, social motivation, zero cringe
c54c0f8e-96eb-4e7b-988a-d67d68bb5ec1.creator: Pump & Chump

c54c0f8e-96eb-4e7b-988a-d67d68bb5ec1.title: NS Friender
c54c0f8e-96eb-4e7b-988a-d67d68bb5ec1.description:
NS Friender is the ultimate connection platform for Network School's most 
  ambitious minds - where crypto degens, AI builders, startup founders, and 
  digital nomads swipe right to find their next co-founder, workout buddy, or
   philosophical debate partner! With voice-first introductions, smart
  matching based on shared interests like "The Burn," Web3, and big ideas,
  plus seamless Discord integration, every swipe could lead to your next
  business venture, lifelong friendship, or Singapore adventure companion -
  because in the Network School universe, your network truly is your net
  worth, and we're here to make you rich in relationships! 🚀💎
c54c0f8e-96eb-4e7b-988a-d67d68bb5ec1.creator: Dopeness

682d9b91-3c1f-49a6-b401-758633adbd81.title: Worlds Best F**ing Therapist
682d9b91-3c1f-49a6-b401-758633adbd81.description:
Just chat to it and share your problems. I bet its the best therapist you have ever talked with.

World’s Best Fing Therapist** is a brutally honest app that tells you what your actual therapist won’t. Every time you vent, it listens carefully... just to tell you that maybe, just maybe, you’re the problem. It’s like ChatGPT with a bad attitude and a mirror. Use it when you need to stop blaming the world and start laughing at yourself.

⚠️ Warning: may cause introspection, laughter, and minor emotional damage.
682d9b91-3c1f-49a6-b401-758633adbd81.creator: Team F**k AI

682d9b91-3c1f-49a6-b401-758633adbd81.title: Eat Healthy?
682d9b91-3c1f-49a6-b401-758633adbd81.description:
Welcome to the most unserious way to get serious about what you eat. Food Calorie Simulator lets you play around with your favorite meals and see what they really add up to. Toss in a burger, a banana, or that suspicious canteen curry, and watch your calorie count come alive.

(WIP) Flip on Dark Mode when it’s time to roast the NS food you eat (because someone has to say it). And remember—living for a thousand years isn’t worth it if you’re eating garbage every day.

Fun, judgmental, and slightly too real. That’s the vibe.
682d9b91-3c1f-49a6-b401-758633adbd81.creator: F**k AI

682d9b91-3c1f-49a6-b401-758633adbd81.title: NS Red Flag Dectector

XoXo,

682d9b91-3c1f-49a6-b401-758633adbd81.title: The Ugly truth
682d9b91-3c1f-49a6-b401-758633adbd81.description:
Ugly Detector
Face the truth, literally.
Fire up the camera and let our brutally honest AI roast your looks straight to your soul. No sugarcoating, no filters, just raw data and bad news. Whether it says you’re a Picasso gone wrong or a walking jump scare, remember—it’s not personal, it’s algorithmic.

Built for the brave, the broken, and the ones who laugh through the pain.
682d9b91-3c1f-49a6-b401-758633adbd81.creator: F--kai
